name: @preact/signals-preact-transform-swc
description: SWC plugin to add names to Preact signal declarations

scripts.build: cross-env RUSTFLAGS="--cfg swc_ast_unknown" cargo build --release --target wasm32-wasip1 && shx rm -rf dist && shx mkdir -p dist && shx cp target/wasm32-wasip1/release/signals_preact_transform_swc.wasm dist/signals_preact_transform_swc.wasm
scripts.build:debug: cross-env RUSTFLAGS="--cfg swc_ast_unknown" cargo build --target wasm32-wasip1 && shx rm -rf dist && shx mkdir -p dist && shx cp target/wasm32-wasip1/debug/signals_preact_transform_swc.wasm dist/signals_preact_transform_swc.wasm
scripts.test: pnpm run build:debug && cd ../.. && vitest run ./packages/preact-transform-swc/test/node/index.test.tsx
